working_on.notes: Local npm run check passes; CI issues traced to formatting scope and duplicate content config file.

pending_tasks.notes: Confirm remote workflow green after pushed fixes

pending_tasks.task: Optional: suppress non-blocking astro z deprecation hints in future Astro migration

recent_changes.description: Fixed Header/Footer type errors in navigation data
Silenced Analytics inline hint and cleaned check output
Fixed Prettier CI scope by ignoring generated .astro files
Removed duplicate src/content/config.ts to avoid duplicate diagnostics

errors_encountered.error: GitHub Actions failed on prettier check with generated .astro files
errors_encountered.solution: Add .astro to .prettierignore and run npm run fix
Add secondaryLinks in footerData and use literal variant type via as const

decisions_made.decision: Keep astro:content z import for compatibility
decisions_made.reason: Switching to zod import caused schema type mismatch error in current setup
Goal is passing CI checks without disabling type checks
